All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

S

safeRun(SchedulerJob, boolean) - Method in class server.scheduler.SchedulerService
Runs a job, containing any exception so the executor (and the job's recurring schedule) survives a one-off failure.
savedView - Variable in class client.view.ReservationListController.EditFlow
The list cards saved on entry and restored on exit.
scheduler - Variable in class server.net.OrderServer
The timed-job runner, started and stopped with the server.
SCHEDULER_POLL_SECONDS - Static variable in class server.scheduler.SchedulerConfig
Seconds between scheduler sweeps.
schedulerButtons - Variable in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Scheduler manual-trigger buttons (enabled only while the server runs).
SchedulerConfig - Class in server.scheduler
Timed-job thresholds, read once from the .env file (via DotEnv) with sensible production defaults baked in.
SchedulerConfig() - Constructor for class server.scheduler.SchedulerConfig
Non-instantiable: all configuration is static.
SchedulerJob - Interface in server.scheduler
One timed maintenance task driven by SchedulerService.
SchedulerService - Class in server.scheduler
Runs the registered SchedulerJobs on a shared ScheduledExecutorService, polling every SchedulerConfig.getPollSeconds() seconds.
SchedulerService(Consumer<String>) - Constructor for class server.scheduler.SchedulerService
Builds the service and registers the jobs this session ships.
screen - Variable in record class client.view.MainShellController.NavItem
The field for the screen record component.
screen() - Method in record class client.view.MainShellController.NavItem
Returns the value of the screen record component.
Screen(String, String, String, String, String, String) - Constructor for record class client.app.Navigator.Screen
Creates an instance of a Screen record class.
screenRoot - Variable in class client.view.ReservationListController
Root container of the screen, swapped out while the edit wizard is shown.
screens - Variable in class client.app.Navigator
Registered screens by id.
secondary(String) - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController.EditFlow
Builds a secondary-styled button.
SELECT_BASE - Static variable in class server.dao.NotificationDAO
Shared SELECT prefix for every read.
SELECT_BASE - Static variable in class server.dao.WaitlistDAO
Shared SELECT prefix for every read.
SELECT_WITH_PARK - Static variable in class server.dao.ParameterChangeDAO
Columns selected by ParameterChangeDAO.listPending() and ParameterChangeDAO.getById(int), joining the park name and the requester's full name in for display.
send(ClientRequest) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Send a request using the active Session connection, asynchronously.
send(Long, Integer, String, String) - Method in class server.control.NotificationService
Persists, delivers, and broadcasts one notification.
sendEvent(ServerEvent) - Method in class server.net.ClientSession
Pushes an unsolicited event from the server to this subscribed client.
sendRequest(ClientRequest) - Method in class client.net.ClientConnection
Sends a request and blocks the caller's thread until the matching response arrives, the request times out, or the connection drops.
sendResponse(ServerResponse) - Method in class server.net.ClientSession
Sends a reply to a client request, serializing access to the output stream so it never interleaves with a concurrent ClientSession.sendEvent(common.dto.ServerEvent).
sentAt - Variable in class common.dto.NotificationDTO
Delivery timestamp (string form), or null if not yet delivered.
serialVersionUID - Static variable in exception class client.net.ClientConnection.ConnectionClosedException
Serialization-format version identifier.
serialVersionUID - Static variable in class common.dto.CancellationsReportDTO
Serialization-format version identifier.
serialVersionUID - Static variable in class common.dto.CancellationsReportRow
Serialization-format version identifier.
serialVersionUID - Static variable in class common.dto.ClientRequest
Serialization-format version identifier.
serialVersionUID - Static variable in class common.dto.NotificationDTO
Serialization-format version identifier.
serialVersionUID - Static variable in class common.dto.OccupancyDTO
Serialization-format version identifier.
serialVersionUID - Static variable in class common.dto.ParameterChangeRequestDTO
Serialization-format version identifier.
serialVersionUID - Static variable in class common.dto.ParkDTO
Serialization-format version identifier.
serialVersionUID - Static variable in class common.dto.ReservationDTO
Serialization-format version identifier.
serialVersionUID - Static variable in class common.dto.ReservationUpdateResultDTO
Serialization-format version identifier.
serialVersionUID - Static variable in class common.dto.ServerEvent
Serialization-format version identifier.
serialVersionUID - Static variable in class common.dto.ServerResponse
Serialization-format version identifier.
serialVersionUID - Static variable in record class common.dto.SubscriptionKey
 
serialVersionUID - Static variable in class common.dto.UserDTO
Serialization-format version identifier.
serialVersionUID - Static variable in class common.dto.VisitDTO
Serialization-format version identifier.
serialVersionUID - Static variable in class common.dto.VisitorDTO
Serialization-format version identifier.
serialVersionUID - Static variable in class common.dto.VisitsReportDTO
Serialization-format version identifier.
serialVersionUID - Static variable in class common.dto.VisitsReportRow
Serialization-format version identifier.
serialVersionUID - Static variable in class common.dto.WaitlistEntryDTO
Serialization-format version identifier.
SERIES_CANCELLED - Static variable in class client.view.CancellationsReportController
Legend name for the cancelled-count series (also the bar order).
SERIES_NO_SHOW - Static variable in class client.view.CancellationsReportController
Legend name for the no-show-count series.
server - Variable in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
The running server instance, or null while stopped.
server.app - package server.app
Server application entry point: the main that launches the GoNature server process, loads configuration, and starts the network listener and scheduled jobs.
server.boundary - package server.boundary
Server JavaFX boundary: the operator GUI that starts/stops the server, shows connected clients, and streams the activity log.
server.control - package server.control
Server business logic: the controllers and services that implement GoNature's use cases.
server.dao - package server.dao
Data access layer: one DAO per aggregate (auth, members, parks, reservations, visits, waiting list, notifications, reports, parameter-change requests).
server.db - package server.db
Database access plumbing: DBConnection manages the JDBC connection to MySQL, and DotEnv loads connection credentials from a .env file into system properties so they stay out of source.
server.net - package server.net
Server networking: the OCSF-style TCP server that accepts client connections, tracks each ClientSession, routes incoming ClientRequests to the domain layer via RequestRouter, and reports lifecycle events through the ServerListener callback interface.
server.scheduler - package server.scheduler
Server-side timed jobs: reminders, confirmation timeouts, waiting-list grab expiry, and no-show marking.
server.subscription - package server.subscription
Real-time push registry: SubscriptionRegistry maps subscription keys (e.g.
server.util - package server.util
Server-side utilities.
ServerEvent - Class in common.dto
A change notification pushed from the server to subscribed clients.
ServerEvent(String, long, EventOp, Serializable) - Constructor for class common.dto.ServerEvent
Creates an event stamped with the current wall-clock time.
ServerGUI - Class in server.boundary
JavaFX GUI for managing the GoNature server.
ServerGUI() - Constructor for class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Creates the server GUI (instantiated by the JavaFX runtime).
ServerGUI.ClientRow - Class in server.boundary
Represents a connected client entry displayed in the table.
ServerListener - Interface in server.net
Callback interface through which the network layer reports its lifecycle and activity to an observer — in practice the operator GUI in server.boundary.
ServerLog - Class in server.util
Minimal server-side error logging — a thin, consistent wrapper over System.err so a failure always shows up in the server console as one located line plus its stack trace, rather than vanishing.
ServerLog() - Constructor for class server.util.ServerLog
Non-instantiable: all logging methods are static.
ServerResponse - Class in common.dto
Represents a response sent from the server to the client.
ServerResponse(boolean, String) - Constructor for class common.dto.ServerResponse
Creates a response without additional data.
ServerResponse(boolean, String, Object) - Constructor for class common.dto.ServerResponse
Creates a response with additional data.
serverSocket - Variable in class server.net.OrderServer
The listening server socket, or null while stopped.
SERVICE_REP - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.Role
Customer service representative.
SERVICE_REP_ONLY - Static variable in class client.view.MainShellController
Visible to the service-representative role only.
session - Variable in class client.app.Navigator
Session injected into controllers that request it.
session - Variable in class client.boundary.GoNatureClientApp
The single client session shared across all controllers.
session - Variable in class client.service.NetworkService
The client session whose connection requests are sent over.
session - Variable in class client.view.DashboardController
The current client session (identity and role).
session - Variable in class client.view.MainShellController
The current client session (identity, connection, role).
session - Variable in class client.view.ReservationCreateController
The current client session (used to prefill a logged-in visitor).
session - Variable in class client.view.ReservationListController
The current client session (used to detect a logged-in visitor).
session - Variable in class client.view.UserLoginController
The current client session (holds the connection and identity).
session - Variable in class client.view.WaitlistController
The current client session (provides the visitor's id).
Session - Class in client.app
Holds connection details and the logged-in identity for the lifetime of the client process.
Session() - Constructor for class client.app.Session
Creates an empty session with no connection or identity yet.
setBusy(boolean) - Method in class client.view.UserLoginController
Toggles the submit button's busy state and label.
setConnDotOk(boolean) - Method in class client.view.MainShellController
Sets the connection dot's ok/error styling.
setConnectedAt(String) - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI.ClientRow
Updates the connection time.
setCorrelationId(long) - Method in class common.dto.ClientRequest
Sets the correlation id used to match the server's response.
setCorrelationId(long) - Method in class common.dto.ServerResponse
Sets the correlation id echoed back to the client.
setLoggedIn(Long, String) - Method in class server.net.ClientSession
Records (on login) or clears (on logout) who is authenticated on this connection and which single-login lock kind they hold.
setPassword(String) - Static method in class server.db.DBConnection
Sets the database connection password.
setSchedulerButtonsEnabled(boolean) - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Enables or disables all scheduler trigger buttons.
setStatus(String) - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI.ClientRow
Updates the client status.
settlementBody() - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController.EditFlow
Returns the step-3 body: the success line plus any settlement message.
settlementMessage(ReservationUpdateResultDTO) - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController
Builds the (simulated) settlement line for a price change after an edit.
setUser(UserDTO) - Method in class client.app.Session
Records a successful staff login (clears any visitor identity).
setVisitor(VisitorDTO) - Method in class client.app.Session
Records a successful visitor login (clears any staff identity).
showAlert(String, boolean) - Method in class client.view.DashboardController
Shows the attention banner.
showCasualTicket(VisitDTO) - Method in class client.view.GateController
Renders the server-priced confirmation for a casual walk-in, leading with the ticket number (the visit id) for the employee to note — it is the only handle for exiting an anonymous walk-in later, under Exit · Casual.
showConfirmation(ReservationDTO) - Method in class client.view.ReservationCreateController
Renders the payment confirmation for a freshly booked reservation from the server's ReservationDTO: reservation number, the server-computed total (price in cents formatted as shekels), and whether it was paid in advance or is due on arrival.
showDetail(ReservationDTO) - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController
Opens a small read-only detail of one reservation: every field the row hints at, spelled out — date, time, party, type, status, price, payment, guide and confirmation code.
showEntryMode(boolean) - Method in class client.view.GateController
Shows the Entry-mode cards and hides the Exit-mode cards (or vice versa).
showError(String) - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController.EditFlow
Shows an inline error message on the wizard.
showError(String) - Method in class client.view.UserLoginController
Shows a login error message.
showGuideField(boolean) - Method in class client.view.ReservationCreateController
Shows or hides the guide-id field (relevant only to GROUP visits).
showMain() - Method in class client.boundary.GoNatureClientApp
Step 2: the role-aware main shell.
showNotificationPopup(NotificationDTO) - Method in class client.view.MainShellController
Shows a non-blocking, auto-dismissing popup with the simulation text "Simulation — would send via <channel> to <target>: <body>".
showPlaceholder(boolean) - Method in class client.view.CancellationsReportController
Swaps between the chart (with its summary line) and the empty-range placeholder.
showStaff(boolean) - Method in class client.view.UserLoginController
Shows the staff pane and hides the visitor pane (or vice versa).
showStep(int) - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController.EditFlow
Renders the wizard step at the given index (title, indicator, body, footer).
showToast(Label, boolean, String) - Static method in class client.view.Widgets
Show the toast with success/error styling, then auto-hide after 3 s.
showUserLogin() - Method in class client.boundary.GoNatureClientApp
Step 1: the combined connect + sign-in screen on the primary stage.
shutdown() - Method in class server.scheduler.SchedulerService
Stops polling and shuts the executor down, waiting briefly for in-flight runs to finish.
shuttingDown - Variable in class client.net.ClientConnection
Set during ClientConnection.close() so the reader loop exits cleanly.
simpleName(String) - Static method in class server.util.ServerLog
Strips the package prefix from a fully-qualified class name.
simulatedTarget - Variable in class common.dto.NotificationDTO
Recipient contact the message would be sent to (email/phone, or a staff username).
socket - Variable in class client.net.ClientConnection
The TCP socket (volatile: shared across reader/sender/close threads).
socket - Variable in class server.net.ClientSession
The client's socket.
SQL_DATETIME - Static variable in class server.control.ReservationController
Format for the grab_expires_at deadline strings handed to WaitlistDAO.
staffPane - Variable in class client.view.UserLoginController
Pane with the staff credential fields.
staffTab - Variable in class client.view.UserLoginController
Tab selecting staff login.
start() - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController.EditFlow
Swaps the wizard in for the list and shows the first step.
start() - Method in class server.net.OrderServer
Starts the accept loop (on a daemon thread) and the timed-job scheduler.
start() - Method in class server.scheduler.SchedulerService
Schedules every registered job at the configured fixed interval.
start(Stage) - Method in class client.boundary.GoNatureClientApp
 
start(Stage) - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Initializes and displays the main server window.
startBtn - Variable in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Starts the server.
startCountdown() - Method in class client.view.WaitlistController
Starts the one-second timeline that updates offer countdowns.
started - Variable in class server.scheduler.SchedulerService
Whether SchedulerService.start() has already scheduled the jobs.
startServer() - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Starts the server after validating the port and testing the database connection.
StartServer - Class in server.app
Entry point of the server application.
StartServer() - Constructor for class server.app.StartServer
Creates the server launcher.
statCard(String, String, String) - Method in class client.view.DashboardController
Builds a stat card with a label, a big value, and a sub-line.
statsRow - Variable in class client.view.DashboardController
Row holding the summary stat cards.
status - Variable in class common.dto.ParameterChangeRequestDTO
Current lifecycle status of the request.
status - Variable in class common.dto.ReservationDTO
Current lifecycle state of the reservation.
status - Variable in class server.boundary.ServerGUI.ClientRow
The client's current connection status.
statusDot - Variable in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Status indicator dot in the header.
statusLabel - Variable in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Status text in the header ("Running …"/"Stopped").
statusProperty() - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI.ClientRow
The client's current connection status.
stayValue - Variable in class client.view.ParkParamsController
Current default-stay value.
STEPS - Static variable in class client.view.ReservationListController.EditFlow
Captions for the three wizard steps.
stop() - Method in class client.boundary.GoNatureClientApp
 
stop() - Method in class server.net.OrderServer
Stops the scheduler, closes the listening socket, and force-closes every still-open client connection so their handler threads unwind.
stopBtn - Variable in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Stops the server.
stopServer() - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Stops the running server.
stylesheet() - Method in class client.boundary.GoNatureClientApp
Returns the shared stylesheet as an external-form URL string.
submit() - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController.EditFlow
Sends UPDATE_RESERVATION; on success advances to Settlement and refreshes the list, on failure surfaces the server message and stays on Review.
submitBtn - Variable in class client.view.ParkParamsController
Submits the change request.
submitBtn - Variable in class client.view.UserLoginController
Sign-in submit button.
submitStaff() - Method in class client.view.UserLoginController
Validates and sends LOGIN_STAFF; on success stores the user and continues.
submitVisitor() - Method in class client.view.UserLoginController
Validates and sends LOGIN_VISITOR; on success stores the visitor and continues.
subscribe(SubscriptionKey) - Method in class server.net.ClientSession
Records that this client now wants change events for key.
subscribe(SubscriptionKey, Consumer<ServerEvent>) - Method in class client.net.EventBus
Registers cb to be invoked on the FX thread whenever the server pushes an event for key.
subscribe(String, long, Consumer<ServerEvent>) - Method in class client.view.BaseController
Registers interest in the entity identified by (entity, entityId).
SUBSCRIBE - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.RequestType
Subscribe to a real-time push channel (e.g.
SubscriberRegisterController - Class in client.view
SERVICE_REP-only form that registers a new subscriber.
SubscriberRegisterController(NetworkService, Session) - Constructor for class client.view.SubscriberRegisterController
Creates the subscriber-registration controller.
subscribers - Variable in class client.net.EventBus
Subscriber callbacks keyed by subscription key.
subscribeToNotifications() - Method in class client.view.MainShellController
Registers interest in the logged-in actor's own notifications.
subscribeToOffers() - Method in class client.view.WaitlistController
Attaches a local-only callback to the actor's notification key so a freshly arrived grab offer (whose only push is the notification) refreshes this list live.
Subscription(SubscriptionKey, Consumer<ServerEvent>) - Constructor for class client.net.EventBus.Subscription
Creates a subscription handle.
SubscriptionKey - Record Class in common.dto
Identifies a single subscribable resource on the server — the pair (entity name, numeric id) that a client wants change events for.
SubscriptionKey(String, long) - Constructor for record class common.dto.SubscriptionKey
Creates an instance of a SubscriptionKey record class.
SubscriptionRegistry - Class in server.subscription
Process-wide registry mapping each SubscriptionKey to the set of ClientSessions that want change events for it.
SubscriptionRegistry() - Constructor for class server.subscription.SubscriptionRegistry
Private: use SubscriptionRegistry.getInstance().
subscriptions - Variable in class server.net.ClientSession
The push subscriptions this connection currently holds.
subscriptions() - Method in class server.net.ClientSession
Read-only snapshot of every subscription this session currently holds.
subtitle - Variable in record class client.app.Navigator.Screen
The field for the subtitle record component.
subtitle() - Method in record class client.app.Navigator.Screen
Returns the value of the subtitle record component.
success - Variable in class common.dto.ServerResponse
Whether the requested operation succeeded.
summaryBox - Variable in class client.view.VisitsReportController
Container for the per-category summary tiles.
summaryLabel - Variable in class client.view.CancellationsReportController
Range-totals summary line below the chart.
summaryTile(String, int, double) - Method in class client.view.VisitsReportController
One per-category summary tile: category, visit count, and average stay.
